context: This scenario tests the skill's ability to fix stale cross-references in a Word (.docx) document. The skill must locate and replace complete cross-reference phrases across all paragraphs and text runs while avoiding unintended changes to numbers that appear in non-reference contexts, and must produce a change log for user review.

checklist.name: Full-phrase matching
checklist.description: Matches complete cross-reference phrases (e.g., 'clause 10.6') rather than bare numbers to prevent accidental substitutions

checklist.name: All paragraphs and runs
checklist.description: Searches across every paragraph and every text run in the document, leaving no occurrences unexamined

checklist.name: Selective replacement
checklist.description: Does not alter occurrences of the same number when it appears outside a cross-reference phrase (e.g., standalone '10' in non-reference text)

checklist.name: Change log production
checklist.description: Records every replacement that was applied, capturing both the old reference phrase and the new reference phrase for user review
